EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {object.value} is removed from the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The group "{object.name}" is created on host {event_src.host}
The group "{object.name}" is removed on host {event_src.host}
The user {object.new_value} is added to the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
